## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Flosum and GrowthX to review SEO performance, discuss KPIs, and align on content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strong organic growth in September: 13% site-wide, 43% for blog, 129% for GrowthX-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Need to update/refresh some older high-performing content (e.g. 21 CFR Part 11 article)](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Aligning on KPIs and setting up tracking for full-funnel metrics from blog to sales](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [Shifting content focus towards security, regulated industries, and trust framework for Q4](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=2410.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Review

  - [Site-wide organic traffic up 13% month-over-month, reversing previous 16-17% drop](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Blog traffic up 43% MoM, reaching new highs beyond July levels](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [GrowthX-specific content up 129% MoM, hitting \~500 organic sessions/month](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Salesforce optimization and DevOps categories performing particularly well](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic continuing to grow across site, blog, and GrowthX content](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [AI visibility in Scrunch tool stabilized after previous dip, citations up 3%](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)

### Content Performance & Updates

  - [Top performing articles include:](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
      - ["How to resolve bad values for restricted picklist field" (April)](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - ["How to deploy profile metadata in Salesforce without breaking permissions" (August)](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - ["How to enable source tracking for Salesforce deployments" (August)](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - ["Salesforce backend pricing features" (older article needing refresh)](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Need to update 21 CFR Part 11 article for technical accuracy and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Aligning on new messaging for federal/government sector, need to review content](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

### KPI Tracking & Reporting

  - [Discussed full-funnel KPIs from organic traffic to sales conversion](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [Need to set up tracking for metrics like email signups, demo requests, white paper downloads](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [Currently getting 8-10 legitimate newsletter signups per month from blog](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Will explore setting up conversions in GA4/Looker for blog-specific actions](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [Recent change in Google's impression reporting causing apparent drops (industry-wide issue)](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=1884.0)

### Content Strategy for Q4

  - [Shifting focus towards security, regulated industries, and trust framework topics](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=2410.0)
  - [Developing new messaging around "security posture" for regulated industries](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=2410.0)
  - [Need to review and approve pending security-related topics in content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=2526.0)
  - [Tying backup/archive capabilities to security use cases (e.g. new employee onboarding)](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=2473.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matt to share updated messaging document on security/regulated industries when ready](https://fathom.video/share/8Fy2Nmxx8sgLZQqWquDLQTtHpDg8RiNP?tab=summary&timestamp=2410.0)
